GenAiFunction.description: Returns valid column API names for a given report type. Call AFTER List Report Types and BEFORE Create Report. Pass the reportType apiName. Use filterKeyword to narrow results (e.g., "Amount", "Date") and maxResults to cap the count. Pick only columns the user needs — do not pass all columns. The apiName values returned are what you use in the columns input of Create Report.
GenAiFunction.masterLabel: WSM - ALF - Agent: Get Report Type Columns
